title: [circt-verilog][hw] --ir-hw timeout in canonicalize after llhd-sig2reg on cyclic hw.struct_inject/hw.bitcast

features.name: always_comb struct member assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block that assigns to a single member of a packed struct

features.name: packed struct with multiple logic members
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing two or more logic members, where the struct is bitcast-compatible
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic a; logic b; } S;

features.name: struct member read outside always_comb
features.description: Code should include an assign statement that reads a struct member different from the one written in always_comb, creating a read-write dependency
